questions.q: What everyday hardware analogy does the MCP introduction use to describe how MCP connects AI applications to external systems?
What are the three core primitives that MCP servers can expose, and what is each used for?
Which underlying RPC protocol and version does the MCP data layer use to encode messages?
What JSON-RPC error code do MCP resource servers return when a resource is not found?
In the Streamable HTTP transport, which HTTP header carries the session identifier, and what status code must a client treat as a signal to start a new session?
If a server using HTTP receives no MCP-Protocol-Version header and cannot otherwise identify the version, which protocol version should it assume?
What is the PyPI package name for the official MCP Python SDK, and what is the recommended install command including the CLI extra?
As of the latest published spec, what is the most recent MCP specification version number and when was it released?
What is the current status of the v2 TypeScript SDK on the main branch, and which version is recommended for production use?
According to the MCP reference servers repository, which official reference server provides built-in Slack messaging and Brave web search as actively maintained servers?
